continue_rescue_conditions.description: do not freeze; continue v6 rescue if there is signal but strict success conditions are not fully met
requires: at least one of: improved_vs_current_cropenc_baseline, sidecar_truly_diverged, semantic_hard_composite_improved_vs_prev

fail_hard_conditions.description: objective family still not working under current Stage2 design
trigger_any: true_new_best_not_warm_start_inherited = false and semantic_hard_composite_improved_vs_prev = false and guaranteed_pair_count_mean_above_or_equal_1_0 = false

notes: This rule gates any later freeze recommendation; the v6 runner outputs only rescue-oriented next steps.
A true v6 success should advance to stage2_semantic_rescue_fullscale_wave1 rather than direct freeze.
